001package net.okocraft.box.api.player;
002
003import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006/**
007 * An interface to get the {@link BoxPlayer} from {@link Player}.
008 */
009public interface BoxPlayerMap {
010
011    /**
012     * Checks if the {@link BoxPlayer} of specified player is loaded.
013     *
014     * @param player the {@link Player} to check
015     * @return {@code true} if loaded, {@code false} otherwise
016     */
017    boolean isLoaded(@NotNull Player player);
018
019    /**
020     * Gets the {@link BoxPlayer}.
021     *
022     * @param player the {@link Player}
023     * @return the {@link BoxPlayer}
024     * @throws IllegalStateException if the player is not online or not loaded
025     */
026    @NotNull BoxPlayer get(@NotNull Player player) throws IllegalStateException;
027}
